title: Blackmoor 66199 Classic 28cm Non Stick Sauté Pan/Deep Sided Induction Frying Pan/Cool Touch Handle & 65740 Classic 18cm Saucepan with Tempered Glass Lid/Non-Stick Coating/Cool Touch Handle
features: Product 1: 28CM SAUTÉ PAN – This Blackmoor Classic 28cm sauté pan is the go-to pan for budding cooks looking to create flavoursome dishes in one place, and will allow you to cook delicious meals for family and friends from the comfort of your own kitchen.

Product 1: NON-STICK COATING – The sauté pan features a non-stick coating that will ensure an efficient release of foods from the pan at all times. The pan also features a forged aluminium base, and a hybrid stone coating that allows heat to conduct faster, and retains said heat for longer when in use.

Product 1: COOL-TOUCH HANDLE – The 28cm saute pan features an ergonomic soft grip and cool touch handle that ensures both your comfort and safety when creating foods in the kitchen. The handle also has a conveniently placed hole that allows you to hang up the pan after use.

Product 1: SUITABLE FOR ALL HOB TYPES – This sauté frying pan is suitable to be used on all hob types such as gas, electric, induction, and even on hot plates too. The pan comes in a stylish black marble effect colour, ensuring it looks the part in any style of kitchen.

Product 2: 18CM SAUCEPAN – This Blackmoor Classic 18cm saucepan is a kitchen must-have, and allows you budding cooks to create delicious sauces, as well as hearty pasta and rice dishes, all from the comfort of your own kitchen.

Product 2: NON-STICK COATING – The saucepan features a non-stick coating that will ensure an efficient release of the foods and sauces from the pot at all times. The pan also features a forged aluminium base, and a hybrid stone coating that allows heat to conduct faster, and retains said heat for longer when in use.

Product 2: TEMPERED GLASS LID – The small saucepan comes complete with a tempered glass lid that not only traps the heat and flavour inside the pot, but allows you to keep an eye on proceedings at all times. The saucepan also features an ergonomic and cool touch soft handle that has a hole in the end to allow you to hang it up once used.

Product 2: SUITABLE FOR ALL HOB TYPES – This saucepot is suitable to be used on all hob types such as gas, electric, induction, and even on hot plates too. The pan comes in a stylish black marble effect colour, ensuring it looks the part in any style of kitchen.
description: Blackmoor 66199 Classic 28cm Non Stick Sauté Pan/Deep Sided Induction Frying Pan/Cool Touch Handle/Suitable for Induction, Electric and Gas Hobs/Black Colour Blackmoor is the UK’s leading supplier of the very best essential kitchenware items to assist you in every aspect of the cooking journey at home. From frying pans and cookpots, to knife sets, chopping boards, kitchen utensils, and bakeware sets, there is something for everyone in the Blackmoor range. This 28cm Classic sauté pan is a kitchen appliance that will allow you to create a hearty batch of delicious meals in one pot, and serve up a treat for your family and friends quickly and efficiently. The sauté pan features an ultra-durable non-stick coating which ensures no food remnants will cling to the base of the pan when you come to serve up your meal. The pan also comes complete with a robust forged aluminium base, and a hybrid stone coating that not only allows the heat to conduct faster around the surface, but also retains the heat for longer when in use. The saute pan has a soft to touch, ergonomic handle that makes the gripping of the pan comfortable, and also features a cool touch property which ensures the handle never gets too hot to pick up when the time arises to serve. This Blackmoor sauté pan is like all Blackmoor pots and pans in the fact that it is suitable to be used on all hob types such as gas, electric, induction, and even hot plates. This ensures that it is the best frying pan to be used in any kitchen, regardless of how yours is designed. The pan comes in a stylish black colour, and has a marble effect that adds to the overall stylish design, ensuring it will both play the part and look the part in any style of kitchen, whether it be modern or traditional. Blackmoor 65740 Classic 18cm Saucepan with Tempered Glass Lid/Non-Stick Coating/Cool Touch Handle/Suitable for Induction, Gas & Electric Hobs/Black Colour Blackmoor is the UK’s leading supplier of the very best essential kitchenware items to assist you in every aspect of the cooking journey at home. From frying pans and cookpots, to knife sets, chopping boards, kitchen utensils, and bakeware sets, there is something for everyone in the Blackmoor range. This Classic 18cm saucepan with lid is the perfect kitchen appliance to allow you to create delicious sauces, as well as make hearty pasta and rice dishes, all from the comfort of your own home. The saucepan features an ultra-durable non-stick coating which ensures no pasta, rice, or sauce remnants will cling to the base of the pan when you come to serve up your creation. The pan also comes complete with a robust forged aluminium base, and a hybrid stone coating that not only allows the heat to conduct faster around the pan, but also retains the heat for longer when in use. The saucepot comes complete with a clear tempered glass lid, that not only keeps the heat and flavour inside the pan, but also allows you to keep an eye on proceedings at all times, ensuring none of your meals boils over or burn in the pan. The small saucepan also features a cool touch, ergonomic soft handle that will ensure the handling of the pan is extra comfortable for you when in use. This Blackmoor saucepan is like all Blackmoor pots and pans in the fact that it is suitable to be used on all hob types such as gas, electric, induction, and even hot plates. This ensures that it is the best saucepan to be used in any kitchen, regardless of how yours is designed. The pan comes in a stylish black colour, and has a marble effect that adds to the overall stylish design of the saucepot, ensuring it will both play the part and look the part in any style of kitchen, whether it be modern or traditional.
